trigger.description: ee import jsonl invoked against a JSONL bundle previously produced by ee export --redaction <level> where one or more memories carried redaction_markers[]. The import preserves the markers (does NOT attempt un-redaction) and emits this informational signal so the caller knows the imported workspace will have hashed/redacted regions.

notes: Severity is info because the round-trip is a SUCCESS path — the property the K6 spec calls for. The signal just confirms the markers are intact for any future un-redaction step.
